text: Capitana Morgana raided the port of Nassau
El Cuervo Negro was shipwrecked near Skull Rock
Barbanegra founded a hideout on Tortuga
The treasure of Isla del Fuego was buried by Captain Reyes
A mutiny broke out aboard the Serpiente Dorada near Coral Bay
Barbablanca defeated the Royal Fleet at Devil's Strait
El Pata de Palo established a trading post in Puerto Cangrejo
The ghost ship Ánimas was last seen near Fog Island
Capitana Morgana signed a truce at Turtle Island
Barbanegra's crew discovered the Cave of Whispers on Isla Sombra
A great storm sank three galleons off Shark Reef
El Cuervo Negro captured the merchant ship Esperanza near Bahía Perdida
Barbablanca retired to a cottage on Turtle Island
The legendary map of Isla del Fuego was stolen from Puerto Cangrejo
Capitana Morgana's fleet was ambushed at Devil's Strait
